languages.text: "Я выяснила, что это самый молодой знатный род на Даргонусе. Мы тоже новички. Возможно, нам и вправду следует держаться вместе".
"I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."
languages.original_text: "Я выяснила, что это самый молодой знатный род на Даргонусе. Мы тоже новички. Возможно, нам и вправду следует держаться вместе".

traits.locale_text: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are new as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."
"I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."
"The Seneschal's house? I've heard it is the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties... but we're new as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."
"I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are new as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."
"I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

languages.text: 「執事の館？貴族の王朝の中でも最も新しく、上り詰めた王朝だと聞いたことがあるが…私たちも新しい。一緒にいるべきかもしれない」
languages.original_text: "The Seneschal's house? I've heard it is the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties... but we're new as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

languages.text: "Dargonus'taki soylu hanedanlar arasına son çıkanlar olduklarını öğrendim. Biz de yeniyiz. Belki de birbirimize tutunmalıyız."
languages.original_text: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

traits.locale_text: "Dargonus'taki soylu hanedanlar arasına son çıkanlar olduklarını öğrendim. Biz de yeniyiz. Belki de birbirimize tutunmalıyız."

languages.text: “我了解到，他们是达戈努斯新近崛起的贵族家族。而我们也是新来者，或许我们应该彼此扶持。”
languages.original_text: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

traits.locale_text: “我了解到，他们是达戈努斯新近崛起的贵族家族。而我们也是新来者，或许我们应该彼此扶持。”

languages.text: "Ich habe gehört, sie sind erst kürzlich in die Adelsklasse von Dargonus aufgestiegen. Aber wir sind auch neu hier. Vielleicht sollten wir uns zusammentun."
languages.original_text: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe gehört, sie sind erst kürzlich in die Adelsklasse von Dargonus aufgestiegen. Aber wir sind auch neu hier. Vielleicht sollten wir uns zusammentun."

languages.text: « J'ai entendu dire que c'était la plus récente des dynasties nobles sur Dragonus… Nous aussi, nous venons d'arriver. Peut-être pourrions-nous nous serrer les coudes ? »
languages.original_text: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai entendu dire que c'était la plus récente des dynasties nobles sur Dragonus… Nous aussi, nous venons d'arriver. Peut-être pourrions-nous nous serrer les coudes ? »

languages.text: «He descubierto que son la dinastía noble más joven de Dargonus. Nosotros también somos nuevos aquí; quizá sea buena idea unirnos».
languages.original_text: "I've learned that they are the most recently ascended of the noble dynasties on Dargonus. We are newcomers as well. Perhaps we ought to stick together."

traits.locale_text: «He descubierto que son la dinastía noble más joven de Dargonus. Nosotros también somos nuevos aquí; quizá sea buena idea unirnos».
